title: Bluetooth LE support on Windows 10 appears to be flaky

messages.author: ErikBrown
messages.text: I am developing a companion application to run on my Windows 10 PC. But I notice that Bluetooth LE support on Windows 10 is really tricky. It works fine on Windows 11 but on Windows 10 I see lots of errors. Transfer just stops every time. I use vb.net, .net10, winforms, Windows.Devices.Bluetooth and Windows 11 SDK. It appears that the BLE support on Windows 10 is not properly implemented. Does anybody know a properly working workaround for this?
